series_metadata.series_description: The ODNR Office of Coastal Management maintains files related to applications for Shore Structure Permits in compliance with Ohio Revised Code Section 1506.40. Files may contain applications; correspondence; technical reviews, site assessments, and site photographs; executed permits; and post-authorization submittals.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Permanent, unless replaced with a legible electronic version ; Electronic: Permanent, Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Permanent
